response.justification: Bogdan is clearly a highly skilled and passionate software engineer with direct, albeit dated, experience working on a C IDE and a demonstrated interest in building developer tools through his extensive personal projects in DLang and recent work at Google. However, there is a significant gap between his expertise and the core requirements of the role. His resume shows no experience with Kotlin or the Spring ecosystem, and his professional Java experience is from over six years ago. While he has the aptitude to learn, he would face a steep learning curve and may not be able to contribute immediately to the enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling as required.
strengths: Direct experience developing components for a commercial IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI).
Proven passion and skill for creating developer tools, libraries, and test frameworks, as shown by numerous personal projects.
Extensive experience as a senior/staff engineer at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) working on complex systems.
concerns: No mention of Kotlin or the Spring ecosystem, which are critical requirements for the role.
Recent professional experience is exclusively in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not the JVM.
Professional Java experience is limited and not recent (last mentioned in a 2016-2018 role).

key_factors.factor: Experience building an IDE and developer tools
